name: Tag Editor — Save Tags
notes: Standalone React component receiving documentId, initialTags, and onTagsUpdated callback as props; all tag list mutations are local-state-only until Save Tags is clicked.
Tag uniqueness and the 10-tag cap are enforced client-side in handleAdd; the backend re-enforces the 10-tag cap server-side and rejects non-string entries.
The save call requires an authenticated session — the axios instance attaches a Bearer token from localStorage key 'docvault_token'; the backend middleware checks JWT, session, or API key.
The entire tags array is replaced atomically on every save (PostgreSQL TEXT[] column overwritten); there is no partial-update or delta mechanism.
